description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a woodgrain finish and a minimalist design. The desk features a thick tabletop supported by two black metal sled-style legs, providing both stability and a contemporary aesthetic. On the front side, there are three drawers: two smaller ones on each end and a larger central drawer, all with sleek black handles. The wood surface has a natural, slightly rustic appearance, with visible grain patterns and a matte finish. The back of the desk is plain, with no drawers or openings, making it suitable for placement against a wall. The overall construction suggests a sturdy yet stylish piece suitable for urban interiors.
description: A modern woodgrain desk with three front drawers and black metal sled legs, featuring a rustic yet contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with black handles and the full width of the woodgrain tabletop.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thickness of the tabletop and the black metal sled leg, with no drawers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain woodgrain surface with no drawers or handles, and the open underside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same tabletop thickness and leg design as the other side, with no drawers visible.
attribute_orientation: The side with three drawers and handles is intended to face the user, serving as the functional front of the desk, while the plain side is the back.
